name: CRISPR Therapeutics AG

latest_note.title: FY2025 10-K Analysis
latest_note.title_th: การวิเคราะห์รายงานประจำปี FY2025
latest_note.summary: [Financial Performance] CRISPR Therapeutics is a pre-profitability gene editing biotech with lumpy milestone-based revenue. FY2025 revenue was $3.5M (near-zero, no major milestones triggered), while t…

top_risks: CRISPR Therapeutics faces a high-risk profile typical of pre-commercial biotech companies, with particular concentration in regulatory, manufacturing, and intellectual property challenges specific to novel gene editing technology

The company's dependence on its Vertex partnership for its only approved therapy (CASGEVY) creates additional concentration risk, while the inherent complexity of gene editing presents ongoing clinical, manufacturing, and market acceptance uncertainties
one_liner: CRISPR Therapeutics is a pre-profitability gene editing biotech with lumpy milestone-based revenue.
